ACK - Enum constant in enum class com.everestmq.commons.protocol.CommandType

Registers a FETCH request that found no data.
allTopics() - Method in class com.everestmq.broker.service.TopicRegistry
Returns all registered topics.

Returns the value of the batchSize record component.

Handles the configuration and binding of the Netty server.

Configures the Netty pipeline for processing EverestMQ broker traffic.

BrokerRequest - Record Class in com.everestmq.commons.model
Represents a request from a client to the broker.

Creates an instance of a BrokerRequest record class.
BrokerRequestHandler - Class in com.everestmq.broker.network
Netty inbound handler that bridges network requests to the BrokerService.
BrokerRequestHandler(BrokerService, FetchRequestManager, BrokerConfig) - Constructor for class com.everestmq.broker.network.BrokerRequestHandler
 
BrokerResponse - Record Class in com.everestmq.commons.model
Represents a response from the broker to a client.

BrokerService - Class in com.everestmq.broker.service
Service implementation for processing EverestMQ broker commands.

Commands recognized by the EverestMQ broker.

Netty decoder that converts raw ByteBuf frames into BrokerRequest objects.

Netty encoder that converts BrokerResponse objects into binary ByteBuf frames.
